---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.

- [Clinical](clinical.html)
- [Immune Subtypes](immunesubtypes.html)
- [Immunertaits](immunetraits.html)
- [PRS](PRS.html)
- [Diversity](diversity.html)
- [Individual Gene](individualgene.html)
- [Uterine cancer subtype analysis](uterine_subtype.html)
- [Lung cancer subtype analysis](lung_subtype.html)
- [LUAD smoking-differential driver analysis](LUAD_smoking.html)
- [UCEC hypermutator-differential driver analysis](UCEC_hypermutator.html)
- [Pan-cancer immune-subtype driver analysis](pancancer_immune.html)
- [Pan-cancer immune-subtype driver analysis (299 driver genes)](pancancer299_immune.html)
